mood: Professional, authoritative, transparent, highly functional, autonomous.

landing_page.grid_mode: Bento Grid ('Tetris' mode), grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8

operator_console.container: w-full mx-auto flex h-screen overflow-hidden bg-white
operator_console.grid_mode: Control Room grid, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4
operator_console.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-200 bg-zinc-50 flex-shrink-0 h-full overflow-y-auto

buttons.primary: bg-[#0047FF] text-white hover:bg-[#003BE0] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#09090B] border border-[#E4E4E7] hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#71717A] hover:text-[#09090B] hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] rounded-lg p-6 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.metric: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] rounded-md p-4 flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.default: border border-[#E4E4E7] bg-white rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0047FF] focus:border-transparent transition-all

badges.fit_a: bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.fit_b: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 border border-yellow-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.fit_c: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-800 border border-zinc-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

tables.header: bg-zinc-50 border-b border-zinc-200 text-zinc-500 font-medium py-3 px-4 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E4E4E7]

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 on feature cards, shadow-md elevation.

hero_background.description: Clean white abstract architecture with sharp lines, representing precise web agent navigation and structured workflows. Use as a subtle background behind the hero text, with an overlay like bg-white/80 to ensure text legibility.

sponsor_logos.description: Abstract white and black card, used as a placeholder for integration logos (Salesforce, Hubspot).
Vintage computer monitor, cropped for logo placement representing CRM integrations.

testimonial_avatars.description: Professional man in tie, representing a Sales Leader or RevOps user.
Professional woman in black, representing an SDR user.
Smiling businesswoman, representing an Account Executive.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast theme. Color is function. Do not add decorative gradients or soft pastels.
Landing Page: Use generous spacing (py-24 to py-32). Incorporate the 'Tetris' bento grid for feature cards and value props.
Operator Console: Use the 'Control Room' layout. The console should be a full-height app (h-screen, overflow-hidden) with a fixed left sidebar (w-64, bg-zinc-50) and a scrollable main content area.
Typography: Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for the body and dashboard data. Import these via Google Fonts/Fontshare in the index.html or App.css.
Navigation: Landing page header must be sticky with backdrop-blur-xl (bg-white/80).
Testing: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) for testing.
Micro-animations: Ensure all buttons and cards have explicit hover and transition classes (e.g. hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg).
Images: Strictly use the provided URLs in the media section for hero background, avatars, and logos. Do NOT use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
